name: A curated list of awesome frameworks, libraries and software for the Java programming language.
description: A curated list of awesome frameworks, libraries and software for the Java programming language.

links.title: ArchUnit
links.description: Test library for specifying and asserting architecture rules.

links.title: jMolecules
links.description: Annotations and interfaces to express design and architecture concepts in code.

links.title: Anahata ASI
links.description: Java agent container with local LLM adapters, stateful tool execution, context management and IDE integration.

links.title: Dokimos
links.description: Evaluation framework for LLM and AI-agent applications that scores responses, validates tool calls and execution traces, and catches quality regressions in CI.

links.title: JamJet
links.description: Agent runtime with a Java SDK for building AI agents, supporting graph-based workflow orchestration, multi-agent coordination, and MCP/A2A protocols.

links.title: LangChain4j
links.description: Simplifies integration of LLMs with unified APIs and a comprehensive toolbox.

links.title: MCP Java SDK
links.description: Enables applications to interact with AI models and tools through a standardized interface (i.e. Model Context Protocol), supporting both synchronous and asynchronous communication patterns.

links.title: Regulus
links.description: Google ADK plugin suite that adds runtime compliance profiles, audit envelopes and GRC adapters for regulated Java AI agents.

links.title: simple-openai
links.description: Library to use the OpenAI API (and compatible ones) in the simplest possible way.

links.title: Spring AI
links.description: Application framework for AI engineering for Spring.

links.title: dOOv
links.description: Provides fluent API for typesafe domain model validation and mapping. It uses annotations, code generation and a type safe DSL to make bean validation and mapping fast and easy.

links.title: Immuto
links.description: Annotation processor that generates type-safe mapper implementations for Java Records using canonical constructors, with zero runtime reflection.

links.title: JMapper
links.description: Uses byte code manipulation for lightning-fast mapping. Supports annotations and API or XML configuration.

links.title: MapStruct
links.description: Code generator that simplifies mappings between different bean types, based on a convention-over-configuration approach.

links.title: ModelMapper
links.description: Intelligent object mapping library that automatically maps objects to each other.

links.title: Orika
links.description: JavaBean-mapping framework that recursively copies (among other capabilities) data from one object to another.

links.title: reMap
links.description: Lambda and method handle-based mapping which requires code and not annotations if objects have different names.

links.title: Selma
links.description: Annotation processor-based bean mapper.

links.title: Apache Maven
links.description: Declarative build and dependency management that favors convention over configuration. It might be preferable to Apache Ant, which uses a rather procedural approach and can be difficult to maintain.

links.title: Gradle
links.description: Incremental builds programmed via Groovy instead of declaring XML. Works well with Maven's dependency management.

links.title: jar-cart
links.description: A modern, zero-configuration package manager and runner for the Java ecosystem written in Go, focusing on developer productivity and build speed.

links.title: ReleaseRun
links.description: Dependency health checker for pom.xml and Gradle projects that scans for CVEs and outdated packages.

links.title: ASM
links.description: All-purpose, low-level bytecode manipulation and analysis.

links.title: Byte Buddy
links.description: Further simplifies bytecode generation with a fluent API.

links.title: bytecode-viewer
links.description: Java 8 Jar & Android APK reverse engineering suite. (GPL-3.0-only)

links.title: Byteman
links.description: Manipulate bytecode at runtime via DSL (rules); mainly for testing/troubleshooting. (LGPL-2.1-or-later)

links.title: cglib
links.description: Bytecode generation library.

links.title: Javassist
links.description: Tries to simplify bytecode editing.

links.title: Maker
links.description: Provides low level bytecode generation.

links.title: Mixin
links.description: Manipulate bytecode at runtime using real Java code.

links.title: Perses
links.description: Dynamically injects failure/latency at the bytecode level according to principles of chaos engineering.

links.title: Recaf
links.description: JVM reverse engineering toolkit, essentially an IDE for Java bytecode.

links.title: cache2k
links.description: In-memory high performance caching library.

links.title: Caffeine
links.description: High-performance, near-optimal caching library.

links.title: Ehcache
links.description: Distributed general-purpose cache.

links.title: Infinispan
links.description: Highly concurrent key/value datastore used for caching.

links.title: Airline
links.description: Annotation-based framework for parsing Git-like command-line arguments.

links.title: JCommander
links.description: Command-line argument-parsing framework with custom types and validation via implementing interfaces.

links.title: jbock
links.description: Reflectionless command line parser.

links.title: JLine
links.description: Includes features from modern shells like completion or history.

links.title: picocli
links.description: ANSI colors and styles in usage help with annotation-based POSIX/GNU/any syntax, subcommands, strong typing for both options and positional args.

links.title: AliveJTUI
links.description: Declarative, React-style TUI library for building terminal UIs as component trees with diff-based rendering, focus management, and themes.

links.title: Jansi
links.description: ANSI escape codes to format console output.

links.title: Jexer
links.description: Advanced console (and Swing) text user interface (TUI) library, with mouse-draggable windows, built-in terminal window manager, and sixel image support. Looks like [Turbo Vision](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Turbo_Vision).

links.title: Text-IO
links.description: Aids the creation of full console-based applications.

links.title: Lanterna
links.description: Easy console text-GUI library, similar to curses. (LGPL-3.0-only)

links.title: AWS SDK for Java
links.description: Provides Java APIs for interacting with Amazon Web Services.

links.title: Google Cloud Client Libraries
links.description: Client libraries for accessing Google Cloud services from Java applications.

links.title: Checkstyle
links.description: Static analysis of coding conventions and standards. (LGPL-2.1-or-later)

links.title: Error Prone
links.description: Catches common programming mistakes as compile-time errors.

links.title: Error Prone Support
links.description: Error Prone extensions: extra bug checkers and a large battery of Refaster templates.

links.title: jQAssistant
links.description: Static code analysis with Neo4J-based query language. (GPL-3.0-only)

links.title: JSpecify
links.description: Standardized nullness annotations designed to work uniformly across various Java IDEs, compilers, and static analysis tools.

links.title: NullAway
links.description: Eliminates NullPointerExceptions with low build-time overhead.

links.title: PMD
links.description: Source code analysis for finding bad coding practices.

links.title: p3c
links.description: Provides Alibaba's coding guidelines for PMD, IDEA and Eclipse.

links.title: RefactorFirst
links.description: Identifies and prioritizes God Classes and Highly Coupled classes.

links.title: SonarJava
links.description: Static analyzer for SonarQube & SonarLint. (LGPL-3.0-only)

links.title: Spoon
links.description: Library for analyzing and transforming Java source code.

links.title: Spotbugs
links.description: Static analysis of bytecode to find potential bugs. (LGPL-2.1-only)

links.title: ToolsHref
links.description: Online Java code analyzer and JSON-to-Mermaid visualization tool.

links.title: Clover
links.description: Relies on source-code instrumentation instead of bytecode instrumentation.

links.title: Cobertura
links.description: Relies on offline (or static) bytecode instrumentation and class loading to collect code coverage metrics. (GPL-2.0-only)

links.title: Delta Coverage
links.description: Computes code coverage of new and modified code based on a provided diff, supporting JaCoCo and IntelliJ coverage engines.

links.title: JaCoCo
links.description: Framework that enables collection of code coverage metrics, using both offline and runtime bytecode instrumentation.

links.title: google-java-format
links.description: Reformats Java source code to follow Google Java Style.

links.title: JHarmonizer
links.description: Safely reorders Java source code with configurable rules and Palantir Java Format.

links.title: Palantir Java Format
links.description: Formatter based on google-java-format with wider lines and lambda-friendly output.

links.title: Spotless
links.description: A versatile code formatter for Gradle and Maven that enforces multiple styles (including Google and Palantir) across Java and other languages.

links.title: ADT4J
links.description: JSR-269 code generator for algebraic data types.

links.title: Auto
links.description: Generates factory, service, and value classes.

links.title: Avaje Http Server
links.description: Generates Lightweight JAX-RS style http servers using Javalin or Helidon (Nima) SE.

links.title: CRUDGen
links.description: Compile-time annotation processor generating CRUD layers, DTOs, JSON Patch, and custom HTTP endpoints for Spring Boot.

links.title: EasyEntityToDTO
links.description: Annotation processor for automatic DTO and Mapper generation with zero boilerplate.

links.title: FreeBuilder
links.description: Automatically generates the Builder pattern.

links.title: Geci
links.description: Discovers files that need generated code, updates automatically and writes to the source with a convenient API.

links.title: Immutables
links.description: Annotation processors to generate simple, safe and consistent value objects.

links.title: JavaPoet
links.description: API to generate source files.

links.title: JHipster
links.description: Yeoman source code generator for Spring Boot and AngularJS.

links.title: Joda-Beans

links.title: JSpecify Package-Info Generator

links.title: Lombok
links.description: Code generator that aims to reduce verbosity.

links.title: Record-Builder

links.title: Spring CRUD Generator

links.title: Telosys

links.title: ANTLR

links.title: JFlex
links.description: Lexical analyzer generator.

links.title: JavaCV
